title: Malta proposes DeFi rulebook covering DAOs under MiCA-era framework
summary: Malta proposes DeFi rulebook covering DAOs under MiCA-era framework
briefing: The Maltese regulator is seeking industry feedback on a legal framework for software-governed organizations, arguing that many DeFi projects are not fully decentralized.

title: Custodia, Vantage propose token that toggles between bank deposits and stablecoins
summary: Custodia, Vantage propose token that toggles between bank deposits and stablecoins
briefing: The proposed system aims to connect traditional banking infrastructure with blockchain-based payment networks with banks retaining customer deposits.

title: Ireland mulls crypto safeguards in response to financial risks
summary: Ireland mulls crypto safeguards in response to financial risks
briefing: For the first time in seven years, the Irish government released an assessment related to digital assets, noting risks from money laundering, terrorism financing, sanctions violations and bribery.

title: Wealthsimple launches Kalshi-powered prediction market app for Canadian investors
summary: Wealthsimple launches Kalshi-powered prediction market app for Canadian investors
briefing: The offering follows regulatory approval earlier this year and comes as prediction markets face legal challenges from regulators, exchanges and policymakers around the world.

title: Ethereum Foundation leadership exodus continues with director’s departure
summary: Ethereum Foundation leadership exodus continues with director’s departure
briefing: Hsiao-Wei Wang’s departure adds to a wave of Ethereum Foundation exits, fueling debate over governance, decentralization and the network’s future.

title: Bitcoin’s deeply discounted versus AI-stocks, but hawkish Fed risk lingers: Bitwise
summary: Bitcoin’s deeply discounted versus AI-stocks, but hawkish Fed risk lingers: Bitwise
briefing: Bitwise analysts say Bitcoin trades in a historical value zone, but hawkish Federal Reserve signals and a competition for liquidity could sideline buyers.

title: HIVE secures $220M AI infrastructure contract with Bell and Cohere
summary: HIVE secures $220M AI infrastructure contract with Bell and Cohere
briefing: The deal is expected to add approximately $70 million in annual recurring revenue as the company scales its AI-focused operations.

title: CME Group sues CFTC over crypto perpetual futures
summary: CME Group sues CFTC over crypto perpetual futures
briefing: The lawsuit targets the federal regulator and Chair Michael Selig, alleging that the Commodity Futures Trading Commissioin is treating cryptocurrency “futures” as “swaps,” posing risks to derivatives markets.

title: Midjourney Pivots From AI Images to Medical Imaging, Aiming to Build a Better MRI Alternative
summary: Midjourney Pivots From AI Images to Medical Imaging, Aiming to Build a Better MRI Alternative
briefing: Image generation company Midjourney is developing a full-body imaging system that combines ultrasound tech with AI smarts.

title: CFTC Hits Celsius Crypto Fraudster Alex Mashinsky With Permanent Trading Ban
summary: CFTC Hits Celsius Crypto Fraudster Alex Mashinsky With Permanent Trading Ban
briefing: The settlement ensures that convicted Celsius founder Alex Mashinsky is unable to trade in CFTC markets or register with the regulator.

title: Algorand Plans to Be Ready for Quantum Computing Threat by End of 2027
summary: Algorand Plans to Be Ready for Quantum Computing Threat by End of 2027
briefing: Quantum computing threatens the blockchain ecosystem, from Bitcoin to Ethereum and beyond, and Algorand has a plan to be prepared.

title: Ethereum Foundation Exodus Continues as Co-Director Hsiao-Wei Wang Departs
summary: Ethereum Foundation Exodus Continues as Co-Director Hsiao-Wei Wang Departs
briefing: Another key figure at the Ethereum Foundation is stepping away from her post, continuing a recent leadership exodus.

title: Perplexity's AI Agent Now Has a Brain That Learns From Its Own Mistakes
summary: Perplexity's AI Agent Now Has a Brain That Learns From Its Own Mistakes
briefing: Brain is a self-improving memory layer that tracks what Computer did, what worked, and what failed—then uses it overnight to make the next task faster and cheaper.

title: Europe's Crypto Firms Face Squeeze as MiCA Transition Period End Looms
summary: Europe's Crypto Firms Face Squeeze as MiCA Transition Period End Looms
briefing: As the MiCA grace period closes, only a fraction of registered firms hold full licenses, setting up the prospect of a wave of consolidation.

title: HIVE Stock Spikes as Bitcoin Miner Lands $220M AI Infra Deal
summary: HIVE Stock Spikes as Bitcoin Miner Lands $220M AI Infra Deal
briefing: The crypto miner has signed a landmark three-year GPU contract with Bell Canada and Cohere—as Canada races to build AI systems it actually owns.

title: Kentucky Sues Kalshi, Polymarket as Prediction Market Legal Battle Swells
summary: Kentucky Sues Kalshi, Polymarket as Prediction Market Legal Battle Swells
briefing: Kentucky accused America’s top prediction market platforms of running illegal sports betting operations, joining a growing stack of states.
